name: plannner-connector
description: Connect Claude to Microsoft Planner — manage plans, buckets, tasks, assignments, and checklists via the Graph API.
long_description: Full CRUD access to Microsoft Planner through the Graph API. Create and manage plans, organize work with buckets, create and assign tasks, track progress, and manage checklists. Authenticates via Microsoft device code flow.

tools.name: planner-login
tools.description: Authenticate with Microsoft using device code flow

tools.name: list-my-plans
tools.description: List all Planner plans you are a member of

tools.name: get-plan
tools.description: Get details of a specific plan

tools.name: assign-task
tools.description: Assign a user to a task

tools.name: unassign-task
tools.description: Remove a user from a task

tools.name: move-task
tools.description: Move a task to a different bucket

tools.name: update-task-details
tools.description: Update task description, checklist, or references

tools.name: add-checklist-item
tools.description: Add a checklist item to a task

tools.name: toggle-checklist-item
tools.description: Toggle a checklist item's checked state
